title: Masako Katsuki
wikitext:
{{Seiyuu Infobox | name = Masako Katsuki | image = [[Image: Masako_Katsuki.jpg]] | characters = [[Minor_Characters| Asuka's stepmother]] | birthday = 10-15-1959 }} Her real name is Masako Shiono. ==A selection of other characters voiced by ''Masako Katsuki''== '''Code Geass''' as ''Karen's stepmother'' '''Gunbuster (OAV)''' as ''Reiko Kashiwara'', ''Miko Akaiki'' '''Gurren Lagann''' as ''Okami (ep 6)'' '''Sailor Moon S, Super S, & Sailor Stars''' as ''Michiru Kaioh/Sailor Neptune'' '''Inuyasha''' as ''Water Goddess'' '''Naruto''' as ''Tsunade'' '''Pokémon''' as ''Yamato (Cassidy)'' ==Notes== * Masako's voice is considered similar to that of [[Yuriko Yamaguchi]]'s, the seiyuu for [[Ritsuko Akagi|Ritsuko]]. ==Links== [http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/people.php?id=1046 Anime News Network Encyclopedia]
[http://www.81produce.co.jp/list.cgi?lady+1133126121150 Masako Katsuki @ 81produce (Japanese)] [[Category:A to Z]] [[Category:Seiyū]]
html:
Masako Katsuki
Characters voiced Asuka's stepmother
Birthday 10-15-1959


Her real name is Masako Shiono.

A selection of other characters voiced by Masako Katsuki[edit]

Code Geass as Karen's stepmother

Gunbuster (OAV) as Reiko Kashiwara, Miko Akaiki

Gurren Lagann as Okami (ep 6)

Sailor Moon S, Super S, & Sailor Stars as Michiru Kaioh/Sailor Neptune

Inuyasha as Water Goddess

Naruto as Tsunade

Pokémon as Yamato (Cassidy)

Notes[edit]

  • Masako's voice is considered similar to that of Yuriko Yamaguchi's, the seiyuu for Ritsuko.

Links[edit]
